---
title: "Bachelor Thesis: Numerical Stability of fMRIPrep Outputs and Its Impact on Functional Connectivity Bio-markers"
---

## Introduction

This bachelor thesis is currently a work in progress. Its goal is to benchmark how numerically stable the fMRIPrep python library to preprocess FMRI data is.

This is done by creating custom `fuzzy-fmriprep` Docker container, using the `Verifiarlo` and `Fuzzy` floating point arithmetic perturbations via the `libmath` library.

## Planification

The diagram below has been updated from the original proposed workplan to reflect the actual progress recorded in the daily journal.

<div id="gantt">
```{mermaid}
gantt
    title Updated Workplan (as of 09-07-2026)
    dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
    axisFormat  %d/%m
    excludes weekends

    section 0. Settlement
    Settle in Japan :done, settlement, 2026-05-08, 2026-05-14

    section Meetings
    Okito and Ayumu san first meeting :done, milestone, meet1, 2026-05-18, 0d
    Okito and Ayumu san second meeting :done, milestone, meet2, 2026-05-25, 0d
    Prof. Esteban intermediate meeting :done, milestone, meet3, 2026-06-01, 0d
    Okito and Ayumu san third meeting :done, milestone, meet4, 2026-06-09, 0d
    Prof. Esteban and PhD. Chatelain meeting :done, milestone, meet5, 2026-06-11, 0d

    section 1. Onboarding
    Familiarize with fMRI dataset       :done, p1t1, 2026-05-15, 2026-05-28
    Set up fuzzy-fMRIPrep container     :done, p1t2, 2026-05-15, 2026-05-28
    Select subjects & define pipeline   :done, p1t3, 2026-05-15, 2026-05-28
    Milestone Design Finalized          :done, milestone, m1, 2026-05-28, 0d

    section 2. Preprocessing
    First 15 perturbed fMRIPrep runs    :done, p2t1, 2026-05-15, 2026-05-29
    Additional fMRIPrep runs            :done, p2t2, 2026-06-01, 2026-06-10
    Milestone fMRIPrep Runs Complete    :done, milestone, m2, 2026-06-10, 0d

    section 3. Analysis
    FC matrices & graph metrics         :done, p3t1, 2026-06-02, 2026-06-12
    SRPB PCA reproduction & analysis    :done, p3t2, 2026-06-15, 2026-07-03
    SRPB FC extraction                  :done, p3t3, 2026-06-23, 2026-06-25
    SRPB harmonization                  :done, p3t4, 2026-06-26, 2026-07-02
    BMB data collection & extraction    :active, p3t5, 2026-07-06, 2026-07-10
    BMB harmonization                   :active, p3t6, 2026-07-06, 2026-07-10
    Compare perturbation vs site bias   :active, p3t8, 2026-07-09, 2026-08-06
    Test feature robustness             :p3t9, 2026-07-20, 2026-08-06
    Milestone Analysis Complete         :milestone, m3, 2026-08-06, 0d

    section 4. Documentation
    Produce scripts and notebooks       :p4t1, 2026-07-20, 2026-08-20
    Write evaluation report             :p4t2, 2026-08-01, 2026-08-31
    Prepare defense materials           :p4t3, 2026-08-15, 2026-08-31
    Milestone Final Defense             :milestone, m4, 2026-08-31, 0d
```
</div>

Please note that this diagram was originally generated by [OpenCode](https://opencode.ai){target="_blank"} (powered by the kimi-k2.7-code model), finetuned based on the proposed workplan, and later updated to reflect actual progress from the daily journal.
